event_contracts.name: Sales.Invoice.Posted:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when a customer sales invoice is confirmed and posted.

event_contracts.name: Inventory.Stock.Adjusted:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when inventory stock level is adjusted.

event_contracts.name: Customer.Created:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when a new customer record is created.

event_contracts.name: Purchase.Receipt.Received:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when goods are received into warehouse.

event_contracts.name: System.Module.Enabled:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when a module is enabled at runtime.

event_contracts.name: System.Module.Disabled:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when a module is disabled at runtime.

event_contracts.name: System.Startup.Completed:v1
event_contracts.description: Fired when SPK kernel completes startup phase.
